name: Host Firewall Disabled
description: Detects disabling of host-based firewalls to allow network access
query:
// Firewall Disabled Detection
// Host firewall turned off
events from endpoint
where event_type = "firewall_disabled"
  or (process_name = "netsh.exe" and command_line contains "firewall" and command_line contains "off")
group by hostname, username
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
